security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:* http://localhost:*; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
